name: Almond Meltaways
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted and cooled slightly
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and almond extract; mix well.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Let cool on wire racks before serving.
